purpose: Feats or rule interactions where implementation classification or runtime accuracy should be verified against Saga Edition Web Enhancement 1 before marking implemented_correct.

entries.name: Tech Specialist
entries.description: Allows a Mechanics-trained character to modify a device, armor, weapon, droid, or vehicle by paying an upfront cost, spending downtime, making a DC 20 Mechanics check without Take 10/Take 20, and applying one listed Tech Specialist trait on success. Failure loses spent credits.
entries.reason: The customization service is substantial, but exact source fidelity still needs targeted verification for source attribution, non-source trait separation, no-Take-10 enforcement for the base feat, downtime/helper handling, market-value metadata, and derived-math parity for all trait targets.
entries.nextDecision: Correct catalog/source metadata and add trait-by-trait tests before marking Tech Specialist implemented_correct.
